tiktok.caption: Stores know when you're sad and they use it. Here's how $3,200/yr disappears without you noticing.

youtube_short.title: Your Sad Moods Are Costing You $3,200/Year
title_alternatives: Retailers Know When You're Stressed — And Cash In
Retail Therapy Is a $3,200 Trap. Here's the Proof
youtube_short.description: When you're stressed, sad, or bored you spend 30% more — and retailers track those exact moments to hit you with ads. 62% of Americans do retail therapy, but 75% regret those purchases within 24 hours. Over 30 years, $3,200/year in emotional spending becomes $363,000 lost forever. The fix is simple: close the app and wait 48 hours. 70% of those urges just disappear on their own. Follow for more money traps nobody talks about. #retailtherapy #personalfinance #psychologyofmoney #moneytips

hook_line: You spend 30% more when you're sad. Stores plan that.
